name: Dave Leroy
subject: Leroy Receives Endorsements from Canyon County Officials
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer
body:
---

| | **CANYON COUNTY LEADERS ENDORSE DAVE LEROY FOR CONGRESS** Today the Leroy for Congress Campaign announced the endorsement of four current Canyon County elected officials and two retired county officials: Canyon County Sheriff**Kieran Donahue** ; Canyon County Prosecuting Attorney **Bryan Taylor** ; Nampa City Councilman **Bruce Skaug** ; Nampa City Councilman **Victor Rodriguez** ; former Nampa Chief of Police **Curtis Homer** ; and former Ada County Coroner **Erwin Sonnenberg**. At a press conference, each person expressed a need for an experienced, proven leader with a deep understanding of Idahoans’ values to fight for Idaho in Washington, D.C. “He will speak, vote and fight for border security, public safety and law enforcement,” said Sheriff Donahue. Councilman Skaug said “Dave is returning to politics at a critical juncture in
our nation’s history...Dave wants to end this gridlock in Washington...” Councilman Rodriguez noted that Dave has dedicated his life to the state of Idaho and said that Dave will “...fight for Idaho’s state sovereignty and stand up for the rights of all Idahoans.” Prosecuting Attorney Taylor also emphasized that Dave will fight for Idaho’s state sovereignty and said, “...it’s time we send an experienced law and order candidate like Dave Leroy to do the job.” “I am honored and humbled to have the support of four of the most talented and committed leaders in Canyon County and in our state,” said Leroy. “With their help, I hope to represent Idaho in the First Congressional District and put conservative legislation in front of our President so that he can sign it.” In Liberty, Dave Leroy
Conservative for Congress [**Click Here to Volunteer **](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jydlhjlk-kulrqjyiu-y/) [](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jydlhjlk-kulrqjyiu-j/) |
---|---|---

[](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jydlhjlk-kulrqjyiu-t/)

[](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jydlhjlk-kulrqjyiu-i/) [](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jydlhjlk-kulrqjyiu-d/)

Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer

[UNSUBSCRIBE](http://daveleroy.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jydlhjlk-kulrqjyiu-r/)

name: Team McDaniel
subject: Madison Project endorses Chris!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
We have some great news! Our campaign was just endorsed by the Madison Project once again. The Madison Project was one of the first groups to endorse us back in 2014, and they also supported Senator Ted Cruz’s call for an investigation into the 2014 Republican Primary runoff in Mississippi. Peter, We have some great news! Our campaign was just endorsed by the Madison Project once again. The Madison Project was one of the first groups to endorse us back in 2014, and they also supported Senator Ted Cruz’s call for an investigation into the 2014 Republican Primary runoff in Mississippi. Join with the Madison Project and thousands of other grassroots conservatives across Mississippi and support our campaign by chipping in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 or more right now! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180504_Madison&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180504_Madison] Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180504_Madison&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180504_Madison] Chip in $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180504_Madison&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180504_Madison] Chip in $50 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180504_Madison&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180504_Madison] Chip in $100 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180504_Madison&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180504_Madison] The Madison Project’s track record of supporting solid, conservative candidates is outstanding. They know that Chris is the only conservative in this race, and that he will be a bulldog fighting for Mississippi’s values, not a lapdog for the Washington establishment. So help support a Mississippi bulldog like Chris McDaniel by chipping in anything you can afford today. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180504_Madison&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180504_Madison] Together, we’ll show the establishment in Washington that they don’t own Mississippi. Thank you, Team McDaniel P.S - The Madison Project has endorsed our campaign! Join with them and support our campaign by chipping in a generous contribution today. name: Dave Leroy
subject: We Need You This Weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer
body:
[](http://daveleroy.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jrhdtrtd-kulrqjyiu-y/)
---

| | Dear Friend, Firstly, I would like to thank all of our current volunteers who have helped my campaign get to the position we’re in today. These final 2 weeks will be vital for securing success and my campaign is going to need all the help it can get from active citizens like you. **Saturday, May 5, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm ** **(Meet in the parking lot at the Leroy sign)** **Mountainview High School** **2000 S. Millennium Way
Meridian, ID 83642** **(Guided/orchestrated door-to-door in groups)** If you can't do door to door please consider joining us for a phone bank night on**Tuesday, May 8th from 5:30 pm - 7:30 pm. This will be located on the 14th floor of the Zion's Bank building., Suite 1460 in downtown Boise. ** We will also need sign wavers at different busy intersections in Ada and Canyon County on election day Tuesday, May 15th. If you would be interested in volunteering please contact my campaign at **208-949-6778** or respond to this email and I will get you signed up! Thank you for your support,
Dave Leroy
Candidate for Congress |
---|---|---

[](http://daveleroy.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jrhdtrtd-kulrqjyiu-j/) [](http://daveleroy.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jrhdtrtd-kulrqjyiu-t/)

Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd208297019a8d298179faa40fcbaa2f76e4364732bf921e5f48372cdbd0308973c2d4bebe514a4a06756e65fcb086ed1b003d21
As Trump Visits State Department, Pompeo Says North Korea Must Denuclearize

- Reuters

Newly confirmed Secretary of State Mike Pompeo said on Wednesday that North Korean denuclearization is a nonnegotiable in upcoming talks. “We are committed to the permanent, verifiable, irreversible dismantling of North Korea’s weapons of mass destruction program,” Secretary Pompeo said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd208297655506b95ed4027663f966d5245c4a39a570d3d5a7ba8a192b703435c8e707bec9e985f3d794ed209e832f6f55fc3135

A State Dept with Swagger? Trump Seeks Reset with Pompeo

- The Associated Press

As crucial decisions loom on Iran and North Korea, President Donald J. Trump visited the State Department this week for the ceremonial swearing-in of Secretary Pompeo. “That’s more spirit than I’ve heard from the State Department in a long time,” the President said to loud applause.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd208297224b2cb0d79aeb56fb90162350fe53aef860ed82f9e908d3363d68668f4b4b282afbc7ccc8b13d7e9f5eb7f4b940a179

Targeting China’s Tools of Aggression

- The Washington Post

Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL) wrote an op-ed this week praising President Trump for going “further than any previous commander in chief to create an opportunity to rebalance our economic relationship with China.” Sen. Rubio adds that Congress should “further strengthen America’s position by making China’s unwillingness to deal on issues of substance as painful as possible."

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd2082976f3f67a62bb698d8200f539402524c279605b1525799620a6ed5296af2b7f32a3c98d450f74bc80e4e23e2d5151a4906

Reuters Poll: Black Male Approval for Trump Doubles in One Week

- The Daily Caller

A Reuters poll taken in late April shows that black male support for President Trump doubled in just one week last month. The findings came just days after rapper Kanye West posted a series of tweets in support of the President.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd20829766c11b7e25c7172f5acc25f786aaa0b8baff9970e6eaf09f61d94bde532ab99628e191a49fc105ae932a3fca8ab15fb1

Trump Praises “Outstanding” Teacher at National Teacher of the Year Presentation

- CBS News

On Wednesday, President Trump congratulated National Teacher of The Year Mandy Manning of Spokane, Washington, on her honor. “To Mandy and all of the amazing educators here today, your tireless dedication doesn't just inspire your students. It inspires all of us,” the President said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd208297aa0afa9d78526daa841b08e4e1e1e61f55ecfa9b4aad0b18494c97c25145665668f53f6f23ad6306e72eaf16d325879c

President Trump Wants to Go Further on Drug Prices: HHS Secretary

- Reuters

Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar said this week that the President “wants to go further in lowering drug prices, an issue he campaigned on during the 2016 presidential race.” President Trump has argued that pharmaceutical companies are “getting away with murder,” Reuters reports.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd208297e4f516e77704b30f0f2ed77bf07f504cdabbd6506fbaa59ef4b4cc8d257a1993759929d78c0af1f495ac425717933b0a
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=04ba0230cd208297bdd5209a612443e1be4cf6a0a1a0af793870e6ffbbb6cd9808d35ca98c75761e30a475f83e7855d82e5d0d772dd2034c
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48ae533fe735f57161eec7e8d90e74b7becb0f6f5eeb9871c63440de1c8cfeece9fa8f98a46a05035e5e918781023425371f71c30cf3ee304
Unsubscribe

Trump visited the State Department this week for the ceremonial swearing-in of Secretary Pompeo. “That’s more spirit than I’ve heard from the State Department in a long time,” the President said to loud applause. Targeting China’s Tools of Aggression - The Washington Post Sen. Marco Rubio (R-FL) wrote an op-ed this week praising President Trump for going “further than any previous commander in chief to create an opportunity to rebalance our economic relationship with China.” Sen. Rubio adds that Congress should “further strengthen America’s position by making China’s unwillingness to deal on issues of substance as painful as possible." The findings came just days after rapper Kanye West posted a series of tweets in support of the President. It inspires all of us,” the President said. President Trump Wants to Go Further on Drug Prices: HHS Secretary - Reuters Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar said this week that the President “wants to go further in lowering drug prices, an issue he campaigned on during the 2016 presidential race.” President Trump has argued that pharmaceutical companies are “getting away with murder,” Reuters reports.

name: Tom Perez
subject: This is a big ask, Derek (but it's important)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This is an investment in our party -- and also an investment in our country. It's an investment in the future we're leaving for our children and grandchildren.
---
Derek --

Before I ask you to make a monthly sustaining contribution to the Democratic Party, I'd like to take a minute to tell you why I'm asking now.

At this moment, Democratic candidates all across the country are building out their campaigns to take on Republicans in every state. It's not going to be easy. But we have a real shot to take back Congress this year -- and the stakes are way too high for any one of us to sit this one out.

The months to come are a critical time to invest in Democrats, and I am counting on you to sustain our fight for the long haul. Contributing monthly is one of the most effective ways to support Democrats running in competitive races nationwide this year while building our party for the long term. So I am asking you today:

**Make a $3 monthly sustaining contribution right now to help Democratic candidates take on the GOP this election cycle and beyond.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522870/4067b0a/5809532f3/7e443956/2487473944/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-sustainer-2018?recurring=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180505_tp_nd&source=em_20180505_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180505_tp_nd")**
Contributing monthly is a big commitment -- but it's also an investment. It's an investment in our party and our country. It's an investment in the future we're leaving for our children and grandchildren. By starting a monthly donation in May, you will have an incredible impact on our party's ability to win nationwide in November and beyond.

You don't need me to tell you that this is a critical year for Democrats. Together we have a chance to not only take back Congress and flip state legislatures -- we can build our party's infrastructure to ensure Democrats keep winning in the years to come. No one else is going to get the job done, Derek.

When Democrats celebrate victories up and down the ballot in November, you can know that your monthly contribution was what made those victories possible.

**[Contribute $3 today to start a monthly donation to the Democratic Party.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522870/4067b0a/5809532f3/7e443957/2487473944/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may-sustainer-2018?recurring=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+3+today+to+start+a+monthly+do&utm_campaign=em_20180505_tp_nd&source=em_20180505_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180505_tp_nd")**

All my best,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522870/4067b0a/5809532f3/7e443954/2487473944/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180505_tp_nd&source=em_20180505_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180505_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522870/4067b0a/5809532f3/7e443955/2487473944/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180505_tp_nd&source=em_20180505_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180505_tp_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522870/4067b0a/5809532f3/7e443952/2487473944/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180505_tp_nd&source=em_20180505_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180505_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522870/4067b0a/5809532f3/7e443953/2487473944/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180505_tp_nd&source=em_20180505_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180505_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Shelbie Konkel, Davis for Kansas
subject: Be part of the change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/M2VC5ln3U1XJVi7utDEIybhC4-VJXOvg3jDqmgxFqgQ=/XnbmPI5P8r14ETFi4bc0P4rETTbunzo-H2vTiN0gWXI=?gpsid=11_36_325&refcode=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=&recurring=1)
Dear Peter,

We're just about six months away from Election Day -- which means this race is about to heat up.

Paul Ryan's Super PAC has already promised to spend millions on ads right here in Kansas. He wants to elect more of the same candidates who have failed to get anything done for years -- but we know that we need a true change in leadership.

**[This race isn't about what divides us -- it's about bringing us together to take Kansas values to D.C. Be a part of that change and stand with us everyday until the election by making a monthly donation.](https://act.myngp.com/el/M2VC5ln3U1XJVi7utDEIybhC4-VJXOvg3jDqmgxFqgQ=/XnbmPI5P8r14ETFi4bc0P4rETTbunzo-H2vTiN0gWXI=?gpsid=11_36_325&refcode=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=&recurring=1)**

We can make our representatives listen to us, work for us, and solve our problems by electing new leaders. But we'll have to fight back against powerful special interests who would rather things stay just the way they are now.

**[Help us fight back and make the change we need -- make a monthly donation today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/M2VC5ln3U1XJVi7utDEIybhC4-VJXOvg3jDqmgxFqgQ=/XnbmPI5P8r14ETFi4bc0P4rETTbunzo-H2vTiN0gWXI=?gpsid=11_36_325&refcode=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=&recurring=1)**

Thank you,

Shelbie Konkel
Finance Director

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/M2VC5ln3U1XJVi7utDEIybhC4-VJXOvg3jDqmgxFqgQ=/XnbmPI5P8r14ETFi4bc0P4rETTbunzo-H2vTiN0gWXI=?gpsid=11_36_325&refcode=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos1_fnd_gq_ndn__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=&recurring=1)

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/M2VC5ln3U1XJVi7utDEIybhC4-VJXOvg3jDqmgxFqgQ=/rxK7c-jeYTiBQo-vQdwlSxQONVmUDKnIR7QU1gUr3Kk=).

We can make our representatives listen to us, work for us, and solve our problems by electing new leaders. But we'll have to fight back against powerful special interests who would rather things stay just the way they are now. Thank you, Shelbie Konkel Finance Director Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas Paul Davis for Congress PO Box 944 Lawrence KS 66044 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Emma Carl
subject: A great problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

If you've driven around the 7th District lately, you may have noticed a familiar name popping up on lawns and roadsides in more and more places.

That's because, to date, we've distributed more than 1,650 campaign signs to families and businesses throughout the district who are eager to show their support for Abigail Spanberger!

That's the good news. The bad news is we're almost out of signs, and we need to raise $1,600 to place another order. **[Can we count on you to pitch in and help us replenish our stock?](https://act.myngp.com/el/snu7osiTcWBg6yHcK8rJLv0H9aFLCHJxEyouqbRfEO4=/DnkuVDOb9Ezr7CYGnShLkWDNtpAssgYx5Z5ljAn_Im4=?refcode=5418signs)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/snu7osiTcWBg6yHcK8rJLv0H9aFLCHJxEyouqbRfEO4=/DnkuVDOb9Ezr7CYGnShLkWDNtpAssgYx5Z5ljAn_Im4=?refcode=5418signs)
Every sign we put up, big or small, helps to keep Abigail's name on the minds of potentially thousands of voters. This is an area where [your contribution](https://act.myngp.com/el/snu7osiTcWBg6yHcK8rJLv0H9aFLCHJxEyouqbRfEO4=/DnkuVDOb9Ezr7CYGnShLkWDNtpAssgYx5Z5ljAn_Im4=?refcode=5418signs) can have a huge impact. We're still getting requests every day, so the sooner you can help, the better.

Thank you so much for your support of this campaign. As Abigail's finance director, I mean it when I say you make all the difference.

Sincerely,

-Emma Carl
_Finance Director_
_Spanberger for Congress_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/snu7osiTcWBg6yHcK8rJLv0H9aFLCHJxEyouqbRfEO4=/HF4e3HYNfv4vKzEF3U_YrpSNZGqgv7O0ylTY5EXY4UE=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/snu7osiTcWBg6yHcK8rJLv0H9aFLCHJxEyouqbRfEO4=/9brTVLAE9mptzOF36jKt3w0md3EJiuts-nW6pCS1L-w=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/snu7osiTcWBg6yHcK8rJLv0H9aFLCHJxEyouqbRfEO4=/i48jTGs-HZDI8HWgH5bhYdRrR9cYgJJ5iVSFMh3sJaw=).

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: You’re my advisor

body:
Which issues should we run on to WIN? |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7089757544c8801c01fd518133ab2f619399052ccd5a671b7cb5f20c8db6632f97e4be9fb014da53f5c77ff3c62863ef062174aa9e8743dc)**

Friend,

Everybody is trying to tell us how to win the midterm elections.

But why not ask the voters themselves. Common sense!

**[I want you to tell me which issues we should run on if we want to WIN the 2018 elections.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7089757544c8801c1795dc766fbfdb5ecf94d564cfba907fdd7b34a20532475040a893ad6e91e0438f8b5b62e61cffc67aa53eb5607f3110)**

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Can you spare 6 bucks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
I'll be brief: a multimillionaire who very well might clinch the GOP nomination has been writing his campaign check after check. It adds up to a whopping $6 million of his own money in the race. I nee |
---

| | Peter,

I'll be brief: a multimillionaire who very well might clinch the GOP nomination has been writing his campaign check after check. It adds up to a whopping $6 million of his own money in the race. [**I need you to chip in to our $6 drive to help us keep up.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c208a/7377f838/3ef065b2/51f97ec1/3630932594/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180505nd&amount=6")

Despite what Rep. Braun may think, politics is not a one-man show. My job is to fight for working and middle-class Hoosiers -- and I can't win without your support, both in the voting booth and financially.

If every person reading this donates $6, we'll have the resources we need to pay for field offices, phone lines, yard signs, and gas for the RV (I hope you're following our tour on social media!).

Will you pitch in just $6? Here's the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c208a/7377f838/3ef065b2/51f97ec1/3630932594/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180505nd&amount=6")

Thanks for all you do. I really appreciate it.

Best,
Joe |
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c208a/7377f838/3ef065b2/51f97ec0/3630932594/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jason Yates
subject: Social media survey results are interesting
body:
| | Should Social Media Sites be regulated?
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2018-social-media-survey-results%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=1)
| Peter, Last week we asked if you think social media sites should be regulated in light of the recent Facebook Cambridge Analytica breach of users’ data and the accusations brought against Facebook that conservatives have been silenced on their platform. The answers were...well...interesting! Click the button below to [see the results](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2018-social-media-survey-results%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=2)! I think the survey sums up well the tension surrounding the issue of social media and regulation. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2018-social-media-survey-results%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.twitter.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Fmyfaithvotes&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180505com01&n=8)
